defaults.description: Since the destruction of Galaxy City, the FBSA has been scrambling to reassign its personnel to more effective positions in Paragon City. Antonio Nash, formerly the New Hero Liaison for GIFT, has been reassigned to a more direct investigative role. His focused research on the effects of Superadine flew to the top of the priority list when a group of Trolls, led by Atta, went on a rampage through Skyway City and defeated two prominent members of the Freedom Phalanx. Now Nash has been caught up in the investigation of Pandora's Box, and what possible ties it could have - if any - with the Trolls and their designer drug of choice.
